commodities.source: brecorder RSS (Brent rebounded to $83.42 from $83.25 8-wk low; PKR 278.30 firming on softer oil)

macro_news.headline: Aurangzeb sees budget upside from US-Iran deal
macro_news.note: FinMin cautiously optimistic on FY27; energy infra damage needs time to normalize

macro_news.headline: US-Iran deal: interim accord extends ceasefire 60 days, reopens Strait of Hormuz
macro_news.note: Structurally bearish oil (Hormuz reopening); final nuclear/proxy issues unresolved — ceasefire could still break. Headwind for E&P realizations.

macro_news.headline: Oil prices slip to lowest since March; Brent ~$83.25
macro_news.note: Falling-oil regime persists → relative E&P headwind (R-EXP-003 inverse). Rebounded slightly to $83.42 on 06-16.

macro_news.headline: Business circles disappointed over SBP rate pause
macro_news.note: SBP held 11.5% (confirmed); FPCCI wants single-digit. Elevated-rate regime persists → R-001 banks NIM thesis intact; cyclicals headwind remains.

macro_news.headline: Central bank keeps policy rate unchanged at 11.5pc; FX reserves $17.2bn
macro_news.note: MPC held citing double-digit inflation; external account moderate. R-001 regime intact.

macro_news.headline: 2026-27 Budget: super tax reduction benefits 216+ listed cos; pharma/real-estate relief
macro_news.note: Super-tax relief EXCLUDES banks/oil-gas/fertilizer (FY27 memory) → no relief OGDC/PPL/FFC/ENGROH. Cement = construction-WHT winner (DGKC/CHCC).

macro_news.headline: Equities rally 2.69% to 177,039 (PRIOR-SESSION RECAP, 06-15)
macro_news.note: DATE HYGIENE: this is the 06-15 close recap, NOT today. Today (06-16) closed 180,392.97 +1.89%. Tagged to correct prior date — no look-ahead.

macro_news.headline: PKR firms to ~278.30 on softer oil; dollar near 10-day lows
macro_news.note: Softer oil + firmer PKR = easing import bill; mildly + for OMCs/importers, neutral-to-slightly- for exporters.
